title: Decadent Greek Eggplant Wrap
description: A sweet and velvety Greek eggplant wrap that marries roasted eggplant with feta, fresh herbs, and spicy ssamjang for a bold Mediterranean adventure.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss the eggplant slices with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then spread them on the sheet and roast for 20 minutes until caramelized.
While the eggplant roasts, mix the cherry tomatoes, feta, dill, mint, lemon juice, and ssamjang in a bowl.
Remove the eggplant from the oven, let cool slightly, then spoon the feta mixture onto each slice.
Warm the wraps in a dry skillet for 30 seconds on each side, then top each with a roasted eggplant slice, a dollop of tzatziki, and a pinch of sumac and paprika.
Fold the sides of the wrap inward, then roll tightly from the bottom up.
Place the wrapped rolls on a plate, drizzle a little extra olive oil, and serve immediately.
